meta.title: How ONE American hero saved 230 PEOPLE from the Texas floods
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

On the early morning of July 4th, a devastating flood hit Central Texas, and one elite Coast Guard Rescue Swimmer overcame incredible odds to save some 230 young children and camp staff. Here's how it happened.
